metadata.title: Studio
metadata.description: A creative studio for film, design, and visual storytelling

hero.title: Stories that move.
hero.subtitle: We craft visual narratives for brands that refuse to blend in.

philosophy.title: Philosophy
philosophy.description: We believe in the weight of restraint. Every frame, every word, every pixel exists because it must. Our work lives at the intersection of art and intention.

about.title: About
about.description: A collective of directors, designers, and storytellers based in New York.

history.title: Our Story
history.content: Founded on the belief that restraint is a form of expression, Studio has spent over a decade crafting work that speaks through simplicity.

programs.title: Work
programs.description: Selected projects across film, branding, editorial, and campaign.

list.title: Film & Motion
list.description: Narrative and documentary filmmaking, from concept to final cut.

list.title: Brand Identity
list.description: Visual systems that distill a brand down to its essential truth.

list.title: Editorial & Campaign
list.description: Art direction and production for print, digital, and beyond.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Interested in working together? We’d love to hear from you.
